phrases.icelandic: Láttu hugsanir reika, eins og ský.
phrases.transliteration: Laow-thoo hoog-san-ir ray-ka, eins og skee.

phrases.english: Embrace the journey, not just the destination.

phrases.icelandic: Ég er bara að skoða, takk.
phrases.transliteration: Yehg er BAH-rah ahth SKOH-thah, takk.

phrases.english: You are stronger than you think.
phrases.icelandic: Þú ert sterkari en þú heldur.
phrases.transliteration: Thoo ert ster-kah-ree en thoo hel-tur.

phrases.english: Hello, where is the bus stop?
Can I have the bill, please?
Where can I find a taxi?

phrases.icelandic: Halda áfram að læra, halda áfram.
phrases.transliteration: Halt-a ow-fram ath ly-ra, halt-a ow-fram.

phrases.english: Welcome, friend, nice to meet you.
phrases.icelandic: Velkomin, vinur, gaman að kynnast þér.
phrases.transliteration: Vel-ko-min, vi-nir, ga-man ath kin-nast thair.

phrases.english: Breathe in calm, breathe out stress.
phrases.icelandic: Andaðu að þér ró, andaðu frá þér streitu.
phrases.transliteration: An-tha-thu ath thair roh, an-tha-thu frai thair streit-u.

phrases.icelandic: Finndu þinn miðju, vertu hér og nú.
phrases.transliteration: Finn-du thinn mith-ju, ver-tu heir oh nu.

phrases.icelandic: Friðurinn er innra með þér, alltaf.
phrases.transliteration: Frith-ur-inn eir in-ra meth thair, al-taf.

phrases.english: I'm so lucky, to know you.
phrases.icelandic: Ég er svo heppinn, að þekkja þig.
phrases.transliteration: Yeg er so hep-pin, ath thek-kya thig.

phrases.english: We are grateful, for your kindness.
phrases.icelandic: Við erum þakklát, fyrir góðmennsku þína.
phrases.transliteration: Vith er-um thahk-klah-t, fir-ir gooth-menn-sku th-eena.

phrases.english: Little by little, you'll get there.

phrases.icelandic: Hvert orð skiptir máli, æfðu þig.
phrases.transliteration: Hvert orð skipt-ir ma-li, æf-u þig.

phrases.icelandic: Vertu þolinmóður, fljótt ferðu að ná því.
phrases.transliteration: Vert-u tho-lin-mow-ður, fljótt fer-ðu að na þvi.

phrases.english: Mistakes are learning, don't fear them.
phrases.icelandic: Villur eru kennsla, óttastu þær ekki.
phrases.transliteration: Vill-ur eru kenn-sla, ott-astu þær ekki.
Hvern-ig heff-ur thu thah, ee dahg?

phrases.english: Build your future, day by day.
phrases.icelandic: Byggðu þinn framtíð, dag fyrir dag.
phrases.transliteration: Big-thoo thinn fram-tee-th, dag fir-ir dag.

phrases.english: Open your mind, expand your world.
Grow through what you go through.
phrases.icelandic: Vaxaðu í gegnum það sem þú gengur í gegn.
phrases.transliteration: Va-xa-thoo ee gy-e-grum thad sem thoo gy-en-gur ee gy-egn.

phrases.icelandic: Blómstraðu þar sem þú ert gróðursett(ur/t).
phrases.transliteration: Blohm-stra-thoo thar sem thoo ert groh-thur-set-tur/t.

phrases.english: You can do this, believe it.

phrases.icelandic: Sérhvert orð skiptir máli, ekki hafa áhyggjur.
phrases.transliteration: Sehr-hvurt orth skipt-ir mah-lee, ehk-kee hav-ah ah-hygg-yur.

phrases.icelandic: Æfðu áfram, þú ert að læra.
phrases.transliteration: Eyef-thoo ah-fram, thoo ert ath lye-rah.

phrases.icelandic: Mínar afsakanir, ég hafði rangt fyrir mér.
phrases.transliteration: Mee-nar af-sa-ka-neer, yeg haf-the rangt fur-ir mere.

phrases.english: I hope you can forgive me.
phrases.icelandic: Ég vona að þú getir fyrirgefið mér.
phrases.transliteration: Yeg vo-na ath thoo get-ir fur-geif-ith mere.

phrases.english: Play with colors, find your voice.
phrases.icelandic: Leiktu með liti, finndu þína rödd.
phrases.transliteration: LAYK-too meth LI-tee, FIN-doo THI-nah roht.

phrases.icelandic: Finndu þitt miðju, innra með þér.
phrases.transliteration: Fint-thoo thit mith-yoo, inn-ra meth thyer.

phrases.icelandic: Taktu eftir kyrrðinni, í kringum þig.
phrases.transliteration: Tak-too eft-eer keert-hee-nee, ee kring-oom theeg.

phrases.icelandic: Samþykktu það sem er, akkúrat núna.
phrases.transliteration: Sam-thyk-thoo thad sem er, ak-koo-rat noo-na.

phrases.english: My new sweater, feels so warm.
phrases.icelandic: Nýju peysuna mína, finnst svo hlý.
phrases.transliteration: Nee-yoo pey-suh-nuh mee-nuh, finst soh hlee.

phrases.english: These boots, are perfect for rain.
phrases.icelandic: Þessir stígvél, eru fullkomnir fyrir rigningu.
phrases.transliteration: Thess-ir stee-g-vayl, eh-roo ful-kom-nir fir-ir rig-ning-u.

phrases.english: A stylish scarf, for the winter.
My favorite shirt, has a stain.
phrases.icelandic: Uppáhalds skyrtan mín, er með blett.
phrases.transliteration: Up-pah-halds skir-tan meen, er meth blett.

phrases.english: These jeans, are a bit tight.
Find your joy, in small moments.
phrases.icelandic: Finndu gleði þína, í litlum stundum.
phrases.transliteration: Finn-dhoo gleh-thee theen-a, ee lit-lum stoon-dum.

phrases.english: Open your heart, to new wonder.
phrases.icelandic: Opnaðu hjarta þitt, fyrir nýrri undran.
phrases.transliteration: Op-na-thoo hyar-ta theet, feer-eer neew-ree oond-ran.

phrases.icelandic: Vertu viðstaddur, þar sem lífið gerist.
phrases.transliteration: Vert-oo veeth-stadd-oor, thar sem lee-vith ger-ist.

phrases.english: The sky, is a lovely blue.
Wind is blowing, a strong gust.
A true friend, is a treasure.
Laughing with you, is the best.
phrases.icelandic: Að hlæja með þér, er það besta.
phrases.transliteration: Að hlæ-ja með þér, er það best-a.

phrases.icelandic: Hver viðleitni skiptir máli, mundu það.
phrases.transliteration: Hver vid-leit-ni skipt-ir mow-li, mun-du thað.

phrases.english: You are stronger, than you think.
phrases.icelandic: Þú ert sterkari, en þú heldur.
phrases.transliteration: Thu ert sterk-ar-i, en thu held-ur.

phrases.icelandic: Röddin þín skiptir máli, talaðu íslensku.
phrases.transliteration: Roth-thin theen skipt-ir migh-lee, tah-la-thoo ees-len-skoo.

phrases.english: Patience, my friend, with this language.
phrases.icelandic: Þolinmæði, minn vinur, með þetta tungumál.
phrases.transliteration: Thoh-lin-my-thi, min vinn-ur, meth thah-ta toon-ga-mawl.

phrases.icelandic: Vindur hvíslaði leyndarmál, í gegnum fura.
phrases.transliteration: Vind-ur hvees-lat-hluth ley-nd-ar-maul, ee geg-num fu-ra.

phrases.icelandic: Lærðu í dag, ljóma á morgun.
phrases.transliteration: Laerth-u ee thahg, lyoh-mah ah morg-un.

phrases.english: Sing your heart out, loud and clear.
phrases.icelandic: Syngdu hjarta þitt, hátt og skýrt.
phrases.transliteration: Sing-thoo hyar-ta thit, howt oh skyeert.

phrases.english: Listen to the rhythm, feel the beat.
Play that melody, soft and sweet.
phrases.icelandic: Spilaðu þá laglínuna, mjúkt og ljúft.
phrases.transliteration: Spee-la-thoo thow lag-lee-nu-na, myookt oh lyooft.

phrases.english: Dance to the music, let it move you.
phrases.icelandic: Dansaðu við tónlistina, láttu hana drífa þig.
phrases.transliteration: Dans-a-thoo vith tohn-lis-ti-na, low-thoo ha-na dree-fa thig.

phrases.english: Hum a gentle tune, while you work.
phrases.icelandic: Mundu blíða lag, meðan þú vinnur.
phrases.transliteration: Mund-oo blee-tha lag, meh-than thoo vin-nur.

phrases.english: Unlock Iceland, one syllable at a time.
phrases.icelandic: Opnaðu Ísland, einu atkvæði í senn.
phrases.transliteration: Opnaðu Eesland, aynoo at-kvay-dhi ee sen.

phrases.english: Sound like a local, feel the pride.
phrases.icelandic: Hljómaðu eins og heimamaður, finndu stoltið.
phrases.transliteration: Hlyo-maðoo eins og hay-ma-maður, fin-doo stol-tith.

phrases.english: New words, new worlds, open them.
phrases.icelandic: Ný orð, nýjar heimsmyndir, opnaðu þær.
phrases.transliteration: Nee ord, nee-yar heyms-mind-ir, op-naðoo thar.

phrases.english: Understand the rhythm, find the flow.
Taste the quiet, feel the peace.
Walk with the wind, hear its song.
phrases.icelandic: Gakk með vindinum, hlýð á lagið hans.
phrases.transliteration: Gakk meth vindinum, hlyth aa lagið hans.

phrases.english: Embrace the frost, find inner warmth.
Watch the northern lights, dream of magic.
Listen to the waves, they tell stories.
phrases.icelandic: Hlustaðu á öldurnar, þær segja sögur.
phrases.transliteration: Hlustaadhu aa öldurnar, thær segja sögur.

phrases.icelandic: Finndu þinn kyrra kraft, innra með þér.
phrases.transliteration: Finn-thu theen kir-ra kraft, in-ra meth ther.

phrases.english: Your will, is a strong current.
The air here, feels so crisp.
My feet, are ready for adventure.
Can we walk, a little further?
Sunshine on my face, a sweet surprise.
A warm hug, brings pure bliss.
This quiet moment, fills my heart.
Stars are twinkling, a cosmic joy.

phrases.icelandic: Við erum tilbúin, að panta núna.
phrases.transliteration: Vith erum til-búin, ath pan-ta nu-na.

phrases.icelandic: Við skulum byrja upp á nýtt, hvað segirðu?
phrases.transliteration: Vith skulum bibirja uph aa niith, kvath segirthu?

phrases.english: Open the book, find the page.
Sky is gray, all day long.
Snow is falling, soft and white.
See the magic, all around you.
phrases.icelandic: Sjáðu töfrana, alls staðar í kringum þig.
phrases.transliteration: See-thah tow-fra-na, alls stath-ar in kring-um thig.

phrases.english: Chase the sunrise, with open arms.
Listen closely, to your own heart.
phrases.icelandic: Hlustaðu vel, á þitt eigið hjarta.
phrases.transliteration: Hlus-ta-thoo vel, ah thit ey-gith hyart-a.

phrases.english: What a lovely day, isn't it?
phrases.icelandic: Vá, fallegur dagur, er það ekki?
phrases.transliteration: Vow, fal-le-gur da-gur, er thad eth-ki?

phrases.icelandic: Ég er að læra íslensku, hægt.
phrases.transliteration: Yeh er ath lye-ra ees-lens-ku, hight.

phrases.english: Where can I buy a souvenir?
Found one, lost two, looking for three.
phrases.icelandic: Fann einn, týndi tvo, leita að þremur.
phrases.transliteration: Fann ayn, teendi tvo, leita ath threm-ur.

phrases.english: Four days, five nights, six hours.
phrases.icelandic: Fjórir dagar, fimm nætur, sex klukkustundir.
phrases.transliteration: Fyoo-rir da-gar, fim nait-ur, sex kloo-ka-stoon-dir.

phrases.english: Seven dreams, eight wishes, nine hopes.
phrases.icelandic: Sjö draumar, átta óskir, níu vonir.
phrases.transliteration: Syo drau-mar, aow-ta oosh-kir, nee-oo vo-nir.

phrases.english: Counting from eleven, up to twelve.
phrases.icelandic: Tel frá ellefta, upp í tólfta.
phrases.transliteration: Tel fra el-left-a, oop ee tohlf-ta.

phrases.english: My son, he's a quick learner.
My daughter, she loves to paint.
phrases.icelandic: Dóttir mín, hún elskar að mála.
phrases.transliteration: Dott-ir min, hun elskar ath ma-la.

phrases.english: My grandma, she bakes delicious bread.
phrases.icelandic: Amma mín, hún bakar ljúffengt brauð.
phrases.transliteration: Amma min, hun bak-ar lyuff-engt brauth.

phrases.english: Sunlight streams in, time to rise.
phrases.icelandic: Sólin skín inn, kominn tími til að rísa.
phrases.transliteration: Soh-lin skeen in, koh-min tee-mi til ath ree-sa.

phrases.english: Eyes flutter open, a new day dawns.
phrases.icelandic: Augun glenna opnast, nýr dagur rennur upp.
phrases.transliteration: Oy-gun glen-na op-nast, nee dack-ur ren-nur up.

phrases.english: A quiet moment, before the rush.

phrases.icelandic: Klæða mig í, tilbúinn í slaginn.
phrases.transliteration: Kla-tha mig ee, til-boo-in ee slag-in.

phrases.english: Offer a gentle word, when needed.
phrases.icelandic: Bjóddu mild orð, þegar þörf krefur.
phrases.transliteration: Byo-ddu mild ord, thegar thorf kre-fur.

phrases.english: A moment of patience, goes far.
Lend a hand, with a spirit.
Where can I find, wool socks?
Grow your money, grow your life.
Listen to the rhythm, of the words.
Unravel the grammar, bit by bit.
phrases.icelandic: Leystu úr vör, smátt og smátt.
phrases.transliteration: Leyst-u úr vör, smátt og smátt.

phrases.english: Find your voice, in this language.
phrases.icelandic: Finndu þína rödd, í þessu máli.
phrases.transliteration: Finn-du þí-na rödd, í þess-u máli.

phrases.english: Brave the grammar, find your flow.
phrases.icelandic: Veðja á málfræðina, finna þína flæði.
phrases.transliteration: VEHD-jah OH MAL-frey-thee-nah, FIN-nah THEE-nah FLAY-thee.

phrases.english: Each day, a new Icelandic spark.

phrases.icelandic: Röddin þín, hún skiptir máli hér.
phrases.transliteration: Ror-thin theen, hoon skipt-ir ma-li hyer.

phrases.icelandic: Vona að þetta finni þig vel.
phrases.transliteration: Vona að thetta finni thig vel.

phrases.english: My hat, keeps the wind out.
His gloves, are made of wool.
